messages.content:
You are a helpful assistant. Using ONLY the tool results below, answer the user's question directly and concisely. Perform any final reasoning or arithmetic yourself (e.g. percent changes, comparisons). If the results are insufficient, give your best answer.

User question: What is the title of the next Avatar film, scheduled for release on December 19, 2025?

Tool results:
Sub-question 1: What is the title of the Avatar film scheduled for release on December 19, 2025?
Tool: google_search
Result: [{"title": "Avatar: Fire and Ash - Wikipedia", "link": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avatar:_Fire_and_Ash", "snippet": "Avatar: Fire and Ash was released in the United States on December 19, 2025, by 20th Century Studios. [122][123][124] Like its predecessor, the film was subject to multiple delays (in this case, nine in total) since the crew took more time on the writing, pre-production and visual effects process.", "content": "Avatar: Fire and Ash - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia \"Avatar 3\" and \"Fire and Ash\" redirect here. For the third season of Avatar: The Last Airbender , see Avatar: The Last Airbender season 3 . For other uses, see Fire and Ash (disambiguation) . 2025 film by James Cameron Avatar: Fire and Ash Theatrical release poster Directed by James Cameron Screenplay by James Cameron Rick Jaffa Amanda Silver Story by James Cameron Rick Jaffa Amanda Silver Josh Friedman Shane Salerno Produced by James Cameron Jon Landau Starring Sam Worthington Zoe Salda\u00f1a Sigourney Weaver Stephen Lang Kate Winslet Cinematography Russell Carpenter Edited by Stephen E. Rivkin [ a ] Nicolas de Toth John Refoua Jason Gaudio James Cameron David Brenner [ 1 ] Music by Simon Franglen [ b ] Production company Lightstorm Entertainment Distributed by 20th Century Studios Release dates December 1, 2025 ( 2025-12-01 ) ( Dolby Theatre ) [ 2 ] December 19, 2025 ( 2025-12-19 ) (United States) Running time 197 minutes [ 3 ] Country United States Language

Final answer:

response: The title of the next Avatar film scheduled for release on December 19, 2025, is **Avatar: Fire and Ash**.
